title: Add ML model training pipeline
original_text: Implemented ML model training pipeline. Added data preprocessing and feature engineering. Implemented model training with hyperparameter tuning. Added model evaluation with cross-validation. Implemented model versioning and registry. Added model deployment pipeline. Added model monitoring for drift detection. Added A/B testing for model comparison. Result: training pipeline operational.
expected_body_lines: - Add data preprocessing and feature engineering
- Implement model training with hyperparameter tuning
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ml): add model training pipeline"
